meta.title: Cloud As A Governance Plane
meta.description: Discover how a simple badge-swipe solution for tracking line downtime evolved into conversations around Cloud DMZ architecture, using the cloud as a governance plane, to manage both cybersecurity risks and operational excellence across globally distributed manufacturing facilities.
